allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\ohkod\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\lucent-roblox; git diff --stat; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("src\\server\\BuildingManager.luau"\); $crlf = 0; $lf = 0; for \($i = 1; $i -lt [Math]::Min\($bytes.Count, 20000\); $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 10\) { if \($bytes[$i-1] -eq 13\) { $crlf++ } else { $lf++ } } }; "CRLF: $crlf  LF: $lf \(first 20KB\)")

PowerShell($tools = "rojo", "luau-lsp", "luau", "selene", "stylua"; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$t : " + $cmd.Source } else { "$t : not found" } })

PowerShell($a = "C:\\Users\\ohkod\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\luau-tools\\luau-analyze.exe"; cd C:\\Users\\ohkod\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\lucent-roblox; & $a src\\shared\\UnitVisuals.luau src\\server\\BuildingManager.luau src\\client\\FabricatorArms.luau src\\client\\init.client.luau src\\server\\init.server.luau)

PowerShell($c = "C:\\Users\\ohkod\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\luau-tools\\luau-compile.exe"; cd C:\\Users\\ohkod\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\lucent-roblox; foreach \($f in @\("src\\shared\\UnitVisuals.luau", "src\\server\\BuildingManager.luau", "src\\client\\FabricatorArms.luau", "src\\client\\init.client.luau", "src\\server\\init.server.luau"\)\) { $out = & $c --binary $f 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "$f : syntax OK" } else { "$f : COMPILE ERROR"; & $c --binary $f | Out-Null } })

PowerShell($a = "C:\\Users\\ohkod\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\luau-tools\\luau-analyze.exe"; $defs = "C:\\Users\\ohkod\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\luau-tools\\globalTypes.d.luau"; cd C:\\Users\\ohkod\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\lucent-roblox; $out = & $a "--definitions=$defs" src\\shared\\UnitVisuals.luau src\\client\\FabricatorArms.luau 2>&1 | Out-String; $lines = $out -split "`r?`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "\\.luau\\\(" -and $_ -notmatch "Unknown \(global|type\) 'task'" -and $_ -notmatch "require" }; "total findings: " + $lines.Count; $lines | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\ohkod\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\lucent-roblox; rojo build default.project.json -o "$env:TEMP\\lucent-test.rbxl"; if \($?\) { "build OK: " + \(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\lucent-test.rbxl"\).Length + " bytes" })
